verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Just beyond the Veil I long to see Your face Just to see Your beauty there just beyond the Veil

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Beautiful You are Beautiful You are Beautiful You are, You are Beautiful You are

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You're the prince of peace, You're the prince of peace, You're the prince of peace, You are You're the prince of peace

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Marvellous You are Marvellous You are Marvellous You are, You are Marvellous You are
